lore.full_text: A metal-tipped bolt sized for crossbow use. This entry is descriptive and is used for ammunition checks and carried-weight calculations.

lore.short_description: Light armor made from treated leather, offering basic protection with full mobility.
lore.full_text: The breastplate and shoulder protectors of this armor are made of leather that has been stiffened by being boiled in oil. The rest of the armor is made of softer and more flexible materials. Leather armor provides a base AC of 11 + your Dexterity modifier.

lore.short_description: A simple wooden bludgeon that is easy to carry and use.
lore.full_text: A club is a basic one-handed melee weapon made from a sturdy length of wood. It deals bludgeoning damage and is light enough to be used with two-weapon fighting when paired with another light melee weapon.

lore.short_description: A simple ranged crossbow that fires bolts with solid range and stopping power.
lore.full_text: The light crossbow is a simple ranged weapon used to launch bolts at distant targets. It deals piercing damage and uses ammunition.
